user_query: I'm planning a vegetarian food tour across Europe and I need some recommendations for vegetarian restaurants in London, Amsterdam, Berlin, Stockholm, Barcelona, and Paris. Can you provide me with a list of vegetarian restaurants in these cities? Additionally, I would like to know the accepted payment types at each restaurant. Thank you!

TaskList.description: Gather a list of vegetarian restaurants in London.
Gather a list of vegetarian restaurants in Amsterdam.
Gather a list of vegetarian restaurants in Berlin.
Gather a list of vegetarian restaurants in Stockholm.
Gather a list of vegetarian restaurants in Barcelona.
Gather a list of vegetarian restaurants in Paris.
For each city, query for the accepted payment types at the gathered vegetarian restaurants.
